children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established, in accordance with this section, an independent instrumentality to be known as a United States Metric Board.

children.heading: Membership; Chairman; appointment of members; term of office; vacancies
children.label: b Membership; Chairman; appointment of members; term of office; vacancies

children.text: the Chairman, a qualified individual who shall be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate;

children.label: A
children.text: one to be selected from lists of qualified individuals recommended by engineers and organizations representative of engineering interests;

children.label: B
children.text: one to be selected from lists of qualified individuals recommended by scientists, the scientific and technical community, and organizations representative of scientists and technicians;

children.label: C
children.text: one to be selected from a list of qualified individuals recommended by the National Association of Manufacturers or its successor;

children.label: D
children.text: one to be selected from lists of qualified individuals recommended by the United States Chamber of Commerce, or its successor, retailers, and other commercial organizations;

children.label: E
children.text: two to be selected from lists of qualified individuals recommended by the American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations or its successor, who are representative of workers directly affected by metric conversion, and by other organizations representing labor;

children.label: F
children.text: one to be selected from a list of qualified individuals recommended by the National Governors Conference, the National Council of State Legislatures, and organizations representative of State and local government;

children.label: G
children.text: two to be selected from lists of qualified individuals recommended by organizations representative of small business;

children.label: H
children.text: one to be selected from lists of qualified individuals representative of the construction industry;

children.label: I
children.text: one to be selected from a list of qualified individuals recommended by the National Conference on Weights and Measures and standards making organizations;

children.label: J
children.text: one to be selected from lists of qualified individuals recommended by educators, the educational community, and organizations representative of educational interests; and

children.label: K
children.text: four at-large members to represent consumers and other interests deemed suitable by the President and who shall be qualified individuals.

children.heading: Compulsory powers
children.label: c Compulsory powers
children.text: Unless otherwise provided by the Congress, the Board shall have no compulsory powers.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: d Termination
children.text: The Board shall cease to exist when the Congress, by law, determines that its mission has been accomplished.
